title: Add settings panel open/close commands
description:
Add CLI commands to open or close the settings panel.

Commands:
  kbs console settings open    - Open settings panel
  kbs console settings close   - Close settings panel
  kbs console settings toggle  - Toggle settings panel

Behavior:
- Opens/closes settings drawer from right side
- Should match existing settings button behavior
- GSAP animations should still apply
- Clicking backdrop should still close

Implementation:
- Add SettingsPanelToggled UIControl event (with boolean)
- Frontend handler updates settingsOpen state
- Should respect motion preferences for animations
creator: ryan.porter
